title: Effects of judgments on state law
doc_html:
Art. 1845. Effects of judgments on state law

            A judgment rendering a law unconstitutional is absolutely null and shall be void and unenforceable if the provisions of Article 855.1 have not been met.

            Acts 2024, 2nd Ex. Sess., No. 12, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 1845.  Effects of judgments on state law
A judgment rendering a law unconstitutional is absolutely null and shall be void and
unenforceable if the provisions of Article 855.1 have not been met.
Acts 2024, 2
nd
Ex. Sess., No. 12, §1.
